name: Tomatillo Guacamole
recipeIngredient: 1/2 to 1 jalapeno, finely-chopped, or Tabasco to taste
recipeInstructions:
Yield: 1 1/2 to 2 cups
Salt to taste
1. Husk the tomatillos and rinse briefly. Simmer in water to cover over medium-high heat until the tomatillos are tender and cooked through. Drain, mash, and cool. If using canned tomatillos, simply drain and mash.
2. Combine with onion, avocado, lemon juice, jalapeno or Tabasco, and salt. Serve immediately.
